name: Dr. Shalaka Chandwadkar
tagline: Bridging traditional wisdom with modern lifestyle.
heroLine: Experience holistic healing with Dr. Shalaka Chandwadkar, MD (BAMS).
bioParagraph: With over 15 years of clinical experience, Dr. Shalaka Chandwadkar is a distinguished Ayurvedic practitioner dedicated to the art and science of holistic healing. Her journey began at the prestigious National Institute of Ayurveda, where she earned her BAMS degree with distinction and a gold medal.
quote: I believe that true health is not merely the absence of disease, but a state of vibrant balance between body, mind, and spirit. My approach combines detailed pulse diagnosis (Nadi Pariksha) with personalized diet and lifestyle plans tailored to each individual.
productTagline: Authentic Ayurvedic formulations curated by Dr. Shalaka Chandwadkar (MD, BAMS) for your holistic well-being.
verifiedLine: Formulated and tested by Dr. Shalaka Chandwadkar (MD, BAMS).
testimonialsDigestive: Dr. Shalaka Chandwadkar's approach to my chronic digestive issues was a revelation. Unlike other treatments, she focused on my diet and stress levels. I feel lighter and more energetic than I have in years.
testimonialsHerbal: I was skeptical about herbal medicines, but Dr. Shalaka Chandwadkar explained the science behind them. My skin condition has cleared up significantly without any harsh chemicals.
